electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 65 Hz - 20 kHz with [X4_60] preset; 120 Hz - 20 kHz with standard [X4] preset (both -10 dB)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 116 dB peak with [X4] preset; 110 dB with [X4_60] preset. Peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4.
electroacoustic.directivity: 110 degrees axisymmetric (-6 dB), free of secondary lobes across the band
electroacoustic.components: Two-way passive coaxial: 1x 4" neodymium LF/mid driver with a coaxially loaded 1.4" diaphragm neodymium HF compression driver; internal passive crossover with custom filters; closed (sealed) acoustical load

operating_modes: Passive single-channel drive (one amplifier output per enclosure, up to 4 X4i in parallel per output)
amplification.per_output_max: 4 X4i per output (6 per output on LA12X)
amplification.preset_note: [X4] is the full-range reference preset for short-throw use; [X4_60] extends the low-frequency limit to 65 Hz for stand-alone or separated-subwoofer use; [X4_MO] is a stage-monitor preset. A low-latency variant of [X4_MO] reduces latency to ~1.18 ms (LA8/LA7.16i) or ~0.84 ms (LA2Xi/LA4X/LA12X). Companion sub presets: [SB6_60/100/200] and [SB10_60/100/200].

connection.input_connector: 2x 2-point screw terminals (IN and LINK) inside a connector sealing plate fitted with two cable glands for 2.5 mm2 cable
connection.loop_through: LINK terminal allows daisy-chaining (parallel) enclosures; unused gland is closed with a protective plug
connection.internal_pinout: L-Acoustics 2-way passive pinout: IN+ / IN- to transducer +/-

physical.dimensions_mm: 116 (W) x 116 (H) x 109 (D), front baffle approx. 99 mm deep / 116 x 116 x 109 mm
physical.dimensions_note: Compact shallow profile, less than 10 cm / 4 in deep
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

rigging_accessories: X-U4i adjustable U-bracket (wall, ceiling, or pole mount with tilt; 2 M5 side inserts)
X-B4i bracket (wall, ceiling, pole, or surface base with tilt; 2 M5 side inserts)
X4i-onCW on-wall / on-ceiling interface with silent blocks for vibration isolation (3 M6 rear inserts)
Secondary safety via 1 M6 rear insert
deployment.mic_stand: Brackets accept European 10 mm threaded axis; US stands via 3/8"-16 male to 5/8"-27 female adapter and locking ring

usage: Installation-specific 4" miniature coaxial point source for short-throw fill and discreet integration where larger boxes will not fit - theaters, houses of worship, corporate spaces, studios, museums, and hospitality venues.
Each X4i is a single-channel passive load (16 ohm); drive up to 4 per amp output (6 on LA12X), for totals of 16 on LA2Xi/LA4X, 24 on LA12X, and 64 on LA7.16i.
Use the [X4] preset for full-bandwidth short-throw response; switch to [X4_60] to push the low-frequency limit to 65 Hz when running stand-alone or separated from the sub.

Pair with SB6i or SB10i subs for distributed background-music or full-range hospitality systems, matching the X4i preset to the sub crossover preset ([SB6/SB10_60/100/200]) and applying the listed inter-element delays.
Deploy as a low-profile stage monitor with the [X4_MO] preset, choosing the low-latency variant when monitoring latency matters.
IP55 rating (with the sealing plate fitted), white/RAL finishes, and the shallow sub-10 cm depth make it suitable for both indoor and weather-exposed architectural installs.
